subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! Praise be unto God that thou hast drunk from the ocean of divine knowledge and turned thy face toward the horizon of manifestation and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله الحمد لله از دریای عرفان الهی آشامیدی و بافق ظهور توجه نمودی و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual transformation, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @infinity and eternity, @soul; spirit after death, @knowledge; recognition of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
